intro: A widespread security vulnerability in AI browsers allows attackers to manipulate LLMs into bypassing safety guidelines through simple mathematical falsehoods, raising concerns about the fundamental reliability of AI agents. Meituan released LongCat-2.0, a 1.6-trillion-parameter open-source model trained entirely on domestic Chinese chips, matching capabilities of other frontier models. Anthropic launched Claude Sonnet 5, a mid-tier model capable of autonomous tool use and planning at performance levels previously requiring larger systems.

whitelist.title: New attack provides one more reason why AI browsers are a bad idea
whitelist.desc: Telling an LLM that 2 + 2 = 5 is enough to make it follow forbidden instructions.

whitelist.title: Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 is here.
